title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Pixel Diffusion (PiD) by Nvidia is an open-source diffusion model for generating high-resolution 4K images. The video demonstrates its use with ComfyUI workflows and compares it against alternatives like SeedVR2.
